settings.review_text: A very strong power bank, able to charge a gaming laptop... Very useful that you can plug in 3 cables as you can charge laptop and phone at the same time. Overall really happy — thumbs up!
Excellent fast charging with attached USB-C cable. Everyone needs a power bank and this one charges faster than others, and is Qi 2 compatible. Highly recommended.
The multiple ports make it very flexible, so I can keep a mix of devices going from one unit instead of carrying several separate chargers. Build quality is very good and it feels solid and premium.
I love the form factor of this charger — it's compact for travel or minimalist space usage on a desk. It charges at 25W for my iPhone 17 and has an extension port if I want to plug something else in.
A very well designed and built charger. The retractable lead is a great idea and I can recommend this for anyone who needs a neat and solid charger for their travels.

This USB-C hub has been a game changer for my MacBook Air. It has a great selection of ports. I was able to achieve fast and stable data transfer and upload speeds compared to the built-in gigabit port.
